queries.question: Empirical analysis of loan duration in months as a determinant of reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Investigation into the absence of a checking account status as a driver of increased credit risk and default likelihood.

queries.question: Assessment of installment rate as a percentage of disposable income as a factor in the mitigation of credit risk exposure.
